summary: Added a centered paused-state play overlay for uploaded/HLS videos.
Shrank the displayed timeline preview bubble with a dedicated preview scale constant.
Updated unit and Playwright coverage for the new player behavior.
validations: PLAYWRIGHT_EXTERNAL_SERVER=1 PLAYWRIGHT_BASE_URL=http://127.0.0.1:3000 npx playwright test tests/public-work-videos.spec.ts --grep "PF-044" --workers=1
risks: The center overlay reappears on any pause, not only before first play.
Preview size tuning is now centralized in one frontend constant and may need retuning later.
recommendation: Adjust the preview scale constant in WorkVideoPlayer if you want further size tuning.
